page: Google Cloud Platform g4-standard-48 is a graphics-optimized virtual machine utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs and is equipped with 180.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 3.75 GB per vCPU.

This server type includes a single bundled NVIDIA RTX Pro 6000 GPU to accelerate graphics and parallel computing tasks. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage options. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

The g4-standard-48 is structured for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources alongside professional-grade GPU acceleration. Qualitatively, the hardware profile balances a high virtual core count with specialized graphics hardware, making it suitable for tasks such as 3D rendering, computer-aided design, video encoding, and virtual workstation hosting.
description: Google Cloud Platform g4-standard-48 is a graphics-optimized virtual machine designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and hardware acceleration. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 48 dedicated vCPUs and 180.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.75 GB of RAM per core. It comes equipped with a single NVIDIA RTX Pro 6000 GPU, making it suitable for professional graphics rendering, video processing, and virtual workstation deployments. The instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence, and includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware configuration offers a balanced allocation of virtual processing cores and system memory alongside specialized graphics hardware to support compute-intensive visual workloads.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform g4-standard-48 is a graphics-optimized server with 48 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 180GB RAM, and one NVIDIA RTX Pro 6000 GPU for professional visual computing workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform g4-standard-48 is a graphics-optimized VM featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs, 180GB RAM, and an NVIDIA RTX Pro 6000 GPU.
tagline: A graphics-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated x86_64 processors and a professional-grade NVIDIA GPU for accelerated visual computing workloads.
bullet_points: One integrated NVIDIA RTX Pro 6000 GPU
Designed for 3D rendering, video encoding, and virtual workstations
